summary: Complete testing of RxExpresss .NET rewrite. All 20 requested features verified working. Backend 15/15 tests passed. Fixed critical bug in JWT claim mapping (ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier vs 'sub'). Frontend all login flows and role-based navigation working.

fixed.issue: User.FindFirst('sub') returned null - JWT claim mapping issue
fixed.fix: Changed to use ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier which ASP.NET maps 'sub' claim to

authentication: POST /api/auth/login admin@rxexpresss.com / Admin@123 returns token with role=Admin
POST /api/auth/login pharmacy@test.com / Pharmacy@123 returns token with role=Pharmacy
POST /api/auth/login driver@test.com / Driver@123 returns token with role=Driver
GET /api/auth/me with admin token returns user info
admin_dashboard: GET /api/admin/dashboard with driver token returns 403 (role-based auth)
pricing: GET /api/pricing/active returns 3 pricing entries (no auth required)
pharmacy: GET /api/pharmacies/my with pharmacy token returns pharmacy info
POST /api/orders with pharmacy token creates order with QR code
driver_portal: GET /api/driver-portal/deliveries with driver token returns deliveries list
frontend: Admin login redirects to /admin/index.html and shows dashboard with stats
Admin orders page loads at /admin/orders.html with order table
Admin drivers page loads at /admin/drivers.html with drivers table
Pharmacy dashboard loads at /pharmacy/index.html after pharmacy login
Driver portal loads at /driver/index.html after driver login

critical_code_review_comments: Clean Architecture properly implemented with RxExpresss.API, Core, Data, Identity projects
Repository Pattern working correctly with IRepository<T>
ASP.NET Identity with Roles (Admin/Pharmacy/Driver/Patient) fully functional
JWT authentication with proper role claims working
SQLite database seeded with 3 users, 1 pharmacy, 1 driver, 3 pricing entries
Pure HTML/CSS/JS frontend with Bootstrap-like theme organized by role folders
seed_data_creation: Database pre-seeded by DbSeeder.cs: 3 users, 1 pharmacy (HealthFirst), 1 driver, 3 pricing entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete ASP.NET Core 8 rewrite tested and working. .NET backend running on port 8001 with SQLite database. Fixed JWT claim mapping issue (ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier vs 'sub'). All role-based authentication working: Admin can access admin dashboard, Driver can only access driver-portal, Pharmacy can access pharmacy endpoints. Frontend uses pure HTML/CSS/JS served as static files. Orders created with QR codes. JSON responses use PascalCase (default ASP.NET).
